name: EdiliziAcrobatica S.p.A.
summary: EdiliziAcrobatica S.p.A. engages in the outdoor construction works in Italy. It provides a range of services, such as renovation, restoration, cleaning, and installation and maintenance. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Genova, Italy. EdiliziAcrobatica S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Arim Holding S.r.l.
